provenance_note: Draw weekdays derived from existing repo code: lottery_api/predict_next_power_lotto.py::get_next_draw_date (POWER_LOTTO draws Mon/Thu, weekday()in[0,3]) and tools/scrape_lottery_data.py line ~146 (BIG_LOTTO draws Tue/Fri, weekday() in [1,4]). DAILY_539 draws every day. The conservative_close_time_local values are a deliberately conservative PLACEHOLDER (not sourced from an official draw-close timetable) pending Owner confirmation of the true official close time; eligibility checks use this as an upper bound so under-estimating draw lateness (setting the cutoff earlier than the true close) is safe (fails closed toward non-live), while over-estimating (setting it later) would NOT be safe -- this value should be tightened, never loosened, without Owner review.
